description.value:
[1 action] Archetype, Concentrate, Polymorph

You fully transform into a massive, powerful wolf. Remove any active @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-devil-fruit-artifacts.devil-fruit-effects.Item.wolfhybrideffect1]{Wolf: Hybrid Form} effect, then apply the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-devil-fruit-artifacts.devil-fruit-effects.Item.wolfbeastformeff1]{Wolf: Full Beast Form} effect to yourself. Remove it to revert to human form.

While in Full Wolf Form:

  • Your land Speed becomes at least 40 feet.
  • You gain imprecise scent 30 feet and a +4 status bonus to Perception and Survival checks to Track.
  • Your size becomes Large (or you gain Powerful Build if already Large or larger).
  • Your unarmed Strikes become Dire Bite (2d8 piercing, trip, deadly d10) and Claws (1d8 slashing, agile).

While in this form, you cannot speak, manipulate objects, or use abilities requiring hands. You can communicate basic intent to allies through growls and body language.

You can maintain Full Wolf Form indefinitely.

Suppressed while Sea-Bound — remove this effect if you become Sea-Bound.
description.gm: Full Wolf Form uses the wolf-human:beast-form roll option, which gates Apex Wolf's physical resistance. Large size should be handled manually on the token. If the character already has higher than 40 ft speed, they keep it — the BaseSpeed RE on the effect uses the higher value.
